title: Develop and implement a streetscape management plan
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop and implement a streetscape management plan demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Define the need for a streetscape management plan

pcs.text: Discuss and clarify client preferences and brief requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss and clarify client preferences and brief requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss and clarify client preferences and brief requirements.

pcs.text: Identify streetscape management plan objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify streetscape management plan objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify streetscape management plan objectives.

pcs.text: Identify a planning team including specialists and consultants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify a planning team including specialists and consultants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify a planning team including specialists and consultants.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Define the need for a streetscape management plan

elements.title: Undertake preliminary planning activities

pcs.text: Identify major stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify major stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify major stakeholders.

pcs.text: Determine availability of specialists to assist in management planning work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine availability of specialists to assist in management planning work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine availability of specialists to assist in management planning work.

pcs.text: Establish timelines for development of management plan and reporting arrangements to client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish timelines for development of management plan and reporting arrangements to client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish timelines for development of management plan and reporting arrangements to client.

pcs.text: Identify required resources for developing management strategies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify required resources for developing management strategies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify required resources for developing management strategies.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Undertake preliminary planning activities

elements.title: Prepare a site description

pcs.text: Identify and map landscape values of area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and map landscape values of area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and map landscape values of area.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and map physical features and characteristics of streetscape.

pcs.text: Research land, including current, cultural and historical modifications, and determine and record effects on the streetscape

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research land, including current, cultural and historical modifications, and determine and record effects on the streetscape.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and document physical condition of site.

pcs.text: Document biological characteristics of site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document biological characteristics of site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document biological characteristics of site.

elements.title: Analyse site information and description

pcs.text: Evaluate information in terms of core principles and objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate information in terms of core principles and objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate information in terms of core principles and objectives.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Produce documents, including plans, technical reports and maps.

pcs.text: Determine priorities and key management issues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine priorities and key management issues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine priorities and key management issues.

pcs.text: Identify and document opportunities and constraints to meeting planning objectives and goals

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document opportunities and constraints to meeting planning objectives and goals.

pcs.text: Make presentation to clients and residents and incorporate feedback into planning documentation

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make presentation to clients and residents and incorporate feedback into planning documentation.

elements.title: Identify management strategies

pcs.text: Identify management strategies that address defined objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify management strategies that address defined objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify management strategies that address defined objectives.

pcs.text: Design management strategies to alleviate existing impacts or to target management action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Design management strategies to alleviate existing impacts or to target management action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Design management strategies to alleviate existing impacts or to target management action.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Cost management strategies and compare to existing budgets and available resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Cost management strategies and compare to existing budgets and available resources.

pcs.text: Plan implementation of work to prioritise outcomes and management resource allocation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan implementation of work to prioritise outcomes and management resource allocation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan implementation of work to prioritise outcomes and management resource allocation.

pcs.text: Consult with clients and residents and incorporate feedback into documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with clients and residents and incorporate feedback into documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with clients and residents and incorporate feedback into documentation.

elements.title: Prepare the management plan

pcs.text: Develop draft management plan that includes site information and management strategies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop draft management plan that includes site information and management strategies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop draft management plan that includes site information and management strategies.

pcs.text: Consult with stakeholders and clients and incorporate agreed changes into final plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with stakeholders and clients and incorporate agreed changes into final plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with stakeholders and clients and incorporate agreed changes into final plan.

pcs.text: Document and present final plan to client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document and present final plan to client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and present final plan to client.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Prepare the management plan

elements.title: Implement the management plan

pcs.text: Implement management plan within predetermined budget, and according to schedule and strategies set out in the plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement management plan within predetermined budget, and according to schedule and strategies set out in the plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement management plan within predetermined budget, and according to schedule and strategies set out in the plan.

pcs.text: Modify implementation strategy to address on-going feedback from clients and residents
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Modify implementation strategy to address on-going feedback from clients and residents?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Modify implementation strategy to address on-going feedback from clients and residents.

pcs.text: Provide reports to clients and residents on progress of implementation works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide reports to clients and residents on progress of implementation works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide reports to clients and residents on progress of implementation works.
